---
title: "rextor"
image: "./img/rextor.png"
format: 
  html:
    link-external-icon: true
    link-external-newwindow: true
---

```{r echo = F}
knitr::include_graphics("./img/rextor.png")
```

## [rextor package](https://iscience-kn.github.io/rextor)

Rextor is an R package to help read in WEXTOR data into R. 
It offers help with basic data preparation as well as styling graphical output and basic help from Rex right inside of R Studio!

Even without using WEXTOR, rextor is a great package for styling plots, e.g. with a white-on-black theme perfect for dark theme quarto presentations.
